title: Melted Flaky Dutch Chicken Legs Stamppot
description: A comfort Dutch dish featuring chicken legs, potatoes, and kale, all in one flavorful pot. Perfect for a lazy Sunday.
instructions: Season the chicken legs with salt, allspice, and black pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken legs until browned, about 5 minutes per side.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to the pot and sauté the chopped onions until softened.
Add the potatoes, kale, milk, salt, and pepper to the pot. Stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the potatoes are tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the sour cream and chopped chives.
Serve the chicken and stamppot hot, garnished with additional chives if desired.
